_comment: PHASE 0.37 — R-CH compliance whitelist. Each entry is a relative file path that violates R-CH-1/-2/-4/-5 but is accepted for now (legacy not-yet-migrated). Diag UI shows whitelisted hits separately from real violations. Owners must remove entries as code is migrated. Format: 'path/to/file.php#R-CH-1' or just 'path/to/file.php' to whitelist all rules for that file.

owners.R-CH-1: channel-gateway team — to drain in M1.W2/W3
owners.R-CH-2: channel-gateway team — to drain in M2.W2
owners.R-CH-4: channel-gateway team — to drain in M4.W2
owners.R-CH-5: channel-gateway team — to drain in M5.W1
